headline: Shares of companies within the broader industrial sector are trading higher amid overall market strength and easing energy costs due to the U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement and President Trump's social media post that signaled a de-escalation of regional conflict and supply-chain disruption.

headline: Shares of data center-related companies are trading higher amid overall market strength. The U.S. and Iran's ceasefire agreement and President Trump's social media post signaled a de-escalation in the Middle East conflict, which could ease supply chain disruption and cut energy costs.

headline: Eaton Expands Operations in Nebraska with New Manufacturing Facility to Meet Increasing Switchgear Demand Driven by AI Data Center Boom
summary: PITTSBURGH, April 08, 2026--Intelligent power management company Eaton today announced an investment of over $30 million to increase U.S. production of its medium-voltage switchgear, the equipment used to protect, control and isolate electrical equipment in data center, utility and industrial power generation and distribution systems.
